note: Validated NuGet package: dotnet pack produces .nupkg with linux-x64 native binary (614KB ELF). Metadata correct (PackageId, Version, Authors, License, Repository). Consumer test project installed package, loaded types, and successfully loaded native library via NativeLibrary.Load. Other 3 RID binaries (win-x64, osx-x64, osx-arm64) not yet built so not in package. Package size 296KB with 1 binary (will be 8-16MB with all 4).
